violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food stored on the walk-in freezer floor.--Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Bags of eggs and sausage patties open in the freezer under the compressor.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave by the soda fountains needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Front doors on the sandwich prep station need to be cleaned. Several shelves have food debris and build-up and need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Open box of to-go containers were being stored on the floor in the dry storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the walk-in cooler need to be cleaned and the floors under the fryers need to be cleaned.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food being stored on the floor of the walk-in cooler and the walk-in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Bottom shelve of the prep table needs to be cleaned. Inside of the cappuccino machine has excessive build up and needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors of the walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer have excessive debris underneath the storage racks.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop left in the bucket in the back utility room, can not air dry properly.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
